description: Omni org-wide Renovate defaults. Repos extend via `github>omnidotdev/.github`. Override per-repo only when necessary.

vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security/CVE updates bypass weekend schedule and require human review (never auto-merged). Routed via the `security` label for triage visibility.

packageRules.description: Group all non-major (>=1.0) updates into one weekly PR. Cuts the typical 30+ PRs/week of individual bumps down to one.
Group + auto-merge GitHub Actions updates. Safe because `:pinDigests` resolves them to immutable SHAs -- a compromised release cannot slip in through tag-tracking.
Auto-merge digest pins. These are SHA pin refreshes -- no version change.
Auto-merge devDependencies patch bumps. Low-risk and high-frequency in TS repos; CI gates the merge.
Production dependencies never auto-merge regardless of update type. Human review on the weekly grouped PR is the gate before code ships to users.
